title: Xtra Crunchy Thai Egg Noodles Pad See Ew
description: A garlicky and crunchy Thai dish featuring egg noodles, perfect for a date night, made with namul-blanch-season method and low-glycemic-friendly ingredients. This pad see ew recipe is a flavorful and healthy option for dinner.
instructions: Heat the vegetable oil in a large skillet or wok over medium-high heat.
Add the minced garlic and cook for 1 minute, until fragrant.
Add the blanched and seasoned namul and cook for 2 minutes, until tender.
Add the cooked egg noodles and stir to combine with the namul and garlic.
Add the soy sauce, oyster sauce, and sesame oil, and stir to combine.
Cook for an additional 2 minutes, until the noodles are well coated with the sauce.
Stir in the chopped scallions and cook for 1 minute, until wilted.
